prescriptions.text: Administer maropitant 1 mg/kg SC in clinic
Dispense Pro-Kolin 5 ml PO q8h x3 days instructions

diagnostics.text: Arrange faecal testing if no improvement by 48h

followup.text: Book nurse progress call for tomorrow at 15:30

admin.text: Email written care instructions to owner
Provide stool sample pot at checkout
